draft:
Dear Officer:

I am writing to provide my highest recommendation for Ms. Zoe Khalidova, an extraordinary individual who possesses a unique blend of skills and expertise in marketing, strategy, and operations. As a seasoned business leader, Ms. Khalidova has consistently demonstrated her ability to drive growth and transformation in the consumer goods industry. Her remarkable track record of success, combined with her unwavering commitment to excellence, makes her an invaluable asset to any organization.

I am currently a Vice President at Nucleus Ventures, where I focus on launching and scaling B2B SaaS companies. My role involves everything from idea validation, financial modeling, and risk assessment to recruitment and leadership of new business units. Prior to this, I held several key positions at Panorama Data, a leading data-as-a-service company. As VP of Product, I led the development and launch of the Ignite platform, which generated over $4.6 million in ARR within 18 months. My strategic leadership and ability to drive growth were instrumental in Panorama Data's acquisition by InsureTech in 2020.

I also served as VP of Strategic Accounts and Director of Customer Success at Panorama Data, where I managed large customer accounts and led product strategy and customer engagement from the company's early stages. My experience in these roles honed my skills in building strong client relationships and delivering innovative solutions that meet market needs.

My career began at Barclays Capital, where I worked as an Analyst in Quantitative and Structured Solutions. This role provided me with a solid foundation in financial modeling and analytics, which have been invaluable throughout my career in tech and business development. I hold a BS in Economics with a focus on Finance from Sloan School of Management, Massachusetts Institute of Technology.

Throughout my career, I have been part of the founding team for five high-growth startups, three of which are in my current role at Nucleus Ventures. This extensive experience in launching and scaling companies has equipped me with a deep understanding of the challenges and opportunities in the startup ecosystem.

I had the pleasure of working closely with Ms. Khalidova during her tenure as a Marketing Lead at Nucleus Ventures from June 2021 to March 2022. Nucleus Ventures is a venture studio renowned for its innovative approach to building and scaling companies. As a Marketing Lead, Ms. Khalidova played a pivotal role in the growth and success of several portfolio companies by developing and executing comprehensive marketing strategies that drove customer acquisition and brand awareness.

Ms. Khalidova's contributions to Nucleus Ventures were nothing short of remarkable. She specialized in healthcare pre-seed and seed ventures, collaborating with three founders to validate and scale their ideas. Her expertise in market research, competitive analysis, and customer segmentation enabled her to identify key growth opportunities and develop targeted marketing campaigns that resonated with target audiences. One of her notable achievements was accelerating the growth of a $20 million telemedicine weight loss company through customer acquisition media and channel expansion. Her data-driven approach and ability to optimize marketing channels resulted in significant increases in user acquisition and revenue growth.

In addition to her work in healthcare, Ms. Khalidova developed a go-to-market strategy for a pre-revenue baby care startup, building its data architecture, CRM, and customer acquisition framework. Her strategic vision and hands-on execution laid a solid foundation for the company's future success. Furthermore, she validated an MVP skincare device concept by simulating acquisition campaigns and analyzing funnel efficiency, providing valuable insights that informed product development and market positioning.

Ms. Khalidova's ability to drive growth and transformation is further exemplified by her impressive track record at Unilever, where she served as a Global Marketing Director for the Bebés brand from 2013 to 2020. In this role, she led the global marketing strategy for a $9 billion brand with a $20 million+ budget, reaching 150 million consumers across 60 markets. Her innovative approach to marketing and her ability to manage complex, cross-functional teams resulted in numerous successes, including the introduction of agile product management and performance marketing practices to the company.

One of Ms. Khalidova's most notable achievements at Unilever was her leadership in transforming the Bebés marketing model from third-party to first-party data-based. She spearheaded the global strategy for Bebés-owned digital products, including the Bebés Rewards/Club app, loyalty program, Bebés.com, and email program. Her efforts reached over 150 million consumers annually across 60+ markets, with direct management of the top-10 markets, including the U.S. and Canada.

Ms. Khalidova's ability to drive significant results was recognized with the prestigious "CEO Award" for outstanding change management, an accolade granted to the top 1% of employees. Her leadership in introducing agile product methodology and performance-based marketing practices to Unilever set new standards for the company and delivered tangible business outcomes.

During her tenure, she led a team of 50+ product and technical professionals across four locations, delivering biweekly product roadmaps and aligning quarterly plans with Vice Presidents in key geographies. Her strategic vision and hands-on execution resulted in a 65% acquisition running rate among new moms in less than six months, up from 16%, with a decreasing cost per acquisition (CPA). This remarkable achievement underscored her ability to drive growth and optimize marketing performance.

Ms. Khalidova's contributions extended beyond digital transformation. She led a $5 million hospital sampling program spanning five countries and reaching over 10 million consumers in Eastern Europe and Central Asia. Additionally, she oversaw $10 million in media budgets for customer acquisition in the top-10 markets, ensuring that Bebés maintained its market leadership and continued to resonate with consumers worldwide.

Her work at Unilever not only demonstrated her expertise in marketing and strategy but also showcased her ability to lead and inspire cross-functional teams to achieve outstanding results. Ms. Khalidova's tenure at Unilever solidified her reputation as a transformative leader capable of driving growth and innovation in highly competitive markets.

Currently, Ms. Khalidova serves as the Chief Marketing Officer and Online Sales General Manager at EduShapes, a private equity-backed consumer goods company specializing in educational toys. In this role, she leads the marketing and customer acquisition strategy for the company, managing an in-house team of 12+ and external partners. Her leadership has been instrumental in driving significant growth and profitability for EduShapes.

Under Ms. Khalidova's guidance, EduShapes has achieved remarkable results. She has managed the P&L for 50% of the business, leading to a doubling of revenue and a 10% profit margin, up from 0%. Her strategic vision and hands-on execution have been key drivers of this success. She has established a robust online business across major platforms such as Amazon, Target, Walmart, and Shopify, growing it to become the #1 channel and ranking in the top-10 in the toys category online.

In addition to her accomplishments in the online space, Ms. Khalidova has launched new sales channels in the healthcare therapy and special education markets, bringing 20% business growth. Her ability to identify and capitalize on new opportunities has been a significant asset to EduShapes. She has also initiated and led a company-wide 5-year strategy review, overseeing R&D, operations, and sales plans in collaboration with the CEO and Board of Directors. Her strategic leadership has ensured that EduShapes is well-positioned for sustained growth and success.

Ms. Khalidova's remarkable achievements at EduShapes underscore her extraordinary ability to drive growth and transformation in the consumer goods industry. Her strategic vision, leadership skills, and hands-on execution have been instrumental in delivering outstanding results for the company. Her contributions have not only strengthened EduShapes's market position but have also laid a solid foundation for future success.

In conclusion, Ms. Khalidova is an extraordinary individual whose unique blend of skills and expertise in marketing, strategy, and operations sets her apart as a transformative leader. Her remarkable track record of success at Unilever and EduShapes, combined with her unwavering commitment to excellence, makes her an invaluable asset to any organization. Ms. Khalidova's ability to drive growth, optimize performance, and lead cross-functional teams to achieve outstanding results is truly unparalleled. I have no doubt that she will continue to make significant contributions to the consumer goods industry and beyond.

Sincerely,

Alex Hargreaves Vice President Nucleus Ventures alex@nucleusvc.com
final:
To Whom it May Concern:

This letter is intended to serve as my highest recommendation of Ms. Zoe Khalidova, an extraordinary transformation and growth executive who possesses a unique blend of skills and expertise in marketing, strategy, and operations. Throughout her career in the field of consumer goods and digital strategy, Ms. Khalidova has consistently demonstrated her ability to drive growth and transformation in the consumer goods industry and beyond. Her remarkable track record of success, combined with her unwavering commitment to excellence, makes her an invaluable asset to any organization lucky enough to have her.

By way of brief background, I am currently the Vice President at Nucleus Ventures, where I focus on launching and scaling B2B SaaS companies. My role involves everything from idea validation, financial modeling, and risk assessment to recruitment and leadership of new business units. Prior to this, I held several key positions at Panorama Data, a leading data-as-a-service company. As VP of Product, I led the development and launch of the Ignite platform, which generated over $4.6 million in ARR within 18 months. My strategic leadership and ability to drive growth were instrumental in Panorama Data's acquisition by InsureTech in 2020. My career began at Barclays Capital, where I worked as an Analyst in Quantitative and Structured Solutions. This role provided me with a solid foundation in financial modeling and analytics, which have been invaluable throughout my career in tech and business development.
Throughout my career, I have been part of the founding team for five high-growth startups, three of which are in my current role at Nucleus Ventures. This extensive experience in launching and scaling companies has equipped me with a deep understanding of the challenges and opportunities in the startup ecosystem.

I had the pleasure of working closely with Ms. Khalidova during her tenure as a Brand and Growth Marketing Lead at Nucleus Ventures from June 2021 to March 2022. Nucleus Ventures is a venture studio renowned for its innovative approach to building and scaling companies. As a Brand and Growth Marketing Lead, Ms. Khalidova played a pivotal role in the growth and success of several portfolio companies by developing and executing comprehensive marketing strategies that drove customer acquisition and brand awareness.

Prior to joining Nucleus Ventures, Ms. Khalidova demonstrated her extraordinary capability in driving growth and transformation at Unilever, where she served as the Marketing Director for the Bebés brand from 2013 to 2020. One of her groundbreaking contributions at Unilever was her pioneering effort in transforming Bebés' marketing approach, setting a new benchmark for both the $1 billion brand and the overarching $80 billion corporation. Her work constituted a significant advancement in the field of consumer goods and digital strategy by crafting an innovative digital marketing model that seamlessly integrated consumer data collection through content marketing and loyalty programs, then effectively using this data to enhance growth and retention marketing strategies. This comprehensive, end-to-end approach was distinctive, as it combined aspects typically seen separately in startups—either focused on growth or content marketing—under a single brand strategy. The scale and efficacy of this initiative were unmatched, impacting millions of consumers across more than 60 markets and driving billions in sales. The wide adoption of Ms. Khalidova's strategy by other billion-dollar brands within Unilever further attests to its revolutionary nature and its substantial contribution to advancing digital marketing practices in the consumer goods industry.

Her work at Unilever not only demonstrated her expertise in marketing and strategy but also showcased her ability to lead and inspire cross-functional teams to achieve outstanding results. Ms. Khalidova's tenure at Unilever solidified her reputation as a transformative leader capable of driving growth and innovation in highly competitive markets.

Currently, Ms. Khalidova serves as the Chief Marketing Officer and Online Sales General Manager at EduShapes, a private equity-backed consumer goods company specializing in educational toys. In this role, she leads the marketing and customer acquisition strategy for the company, managing an in-house team of 12+ and external partners. Her leadership has been instrumental in driving significant growth and profitability for EduShapes.

Outside of her professional achievements, Ms. Khalidova is deeply involved in the entrepreneurship and startup ecosystem, with her mentorship at the Westlake Magnuson Center for Entrepreneurship being just one example of her many contributions. She was accepted into the Startup Mentor Network at Westlake due to her outstanding abilities and accomplishments in the fields of consumer goods and digital strategy. In this role, she leverages her extensive expertise in consumer goods marketing to support and guide students and alumni as they launch and scale their ventures. Her contributions have been invaluable in fostering entrepreneurial growth and innovation within the Westlake community, helping to shape future leaders in the startup landscape.

Beyond Westlake, Ms. Khalidova actively contributes to several prestigious entrepreneurship programs, serving as both a judge and advisor. At NYU, she participates in the MBA Venture Associate Program, an initiative designed to connect MBA students with venture capital firms and real-world investment opportunities. As part of the program’s pitch application review process, she provides strategic feedback to founders, helping them refine their business models, strengthen their market positioning, and improve their investor pitches.

Ms. Khalidova also lends her expertise to the Sloan Entrepreneurship Acceleration Program, a rigorous initiative within the Sloan School of Management that helps early-stage startups scale through mentorship and hands-on guidance. As a mentor and pitch competition judge, she works closely with entrepreneurs to sharpen their go-to-market strategies, enhance financial planning, and craft compelling narratives for potential investors.

Additionally, as a pitch judge for the Massachusetts Institute of Technology Startup Challenge, a premier competition showcasing the university’s most promising ventures, she evaluates innovative ideas across various industries. Her role involves assessing business viability, offering actionable feedback, and helping entrepreneurs prepare for high-stakes pitch events that can unlock funding and partnership opportunities. Through these roles, Ms. Khalidova leverages her extensive experience to mentor and empower the next generation of business leaders, ensuring they receive the strategic insights and support necessary to thrive in the entrepreneurial landscape.

In summary, Ms. Khalidova is a transformative leader whose expertise in marketing and strategy drives significant growth and innovation. Her pioneering contributions have set new standards in the consumer goods industry. Through her roles at Nucleus Ventures, Unilever, and EduShapes, as well as her active mentorship in prestigious entrepreneurship programs, she has consistently demonstrated her ability to inspire teams and shape future business leaders. Her dedication and impact make her an invaluable asset to any organization.

Very truly yours,


Alex Hargreaves
Vice President
Nucleus Ventures
[insert contact information]
